title: Kitmiido Steel Garage Storage Hooks - 12 Pack Anti-Slip Coating, Heavy Duty Wall Mount Hooks for Hanging Bike, Ladder, Garden Tools (Orange)
features: Robust and Non-Slip Design with Exceptional Strength: Our garage hooks are crafted from heavy-duty steel with a durable PVC anti-slip coating. They can effortlessly hold heavy items, with each hook capable of easily supporting up to 35kg, preventing slipping and safeguarding your tools and equipment.

Versatile Sizes: This set includes 12 wall-mounted ladder hooks in various sizes. You'll find 4 small U-hooks, 1 medium U-hook, 2 large U-hooks, 2 small J-hooks, 1 large J-hook, and 2 extension cord organizer straps. These hooks are designed to cater to tools of different sizes and weights, helping you declutter your space effectively.

Maximise Your Space: Made from solid steel, these hooks are designed to maximise storage space in your garage, garden, shop, basement, or warehouse. The double hook design ensures a tidy and organised storage system.

Easy Installation: Our heavy-duty storage hooks can be easily installed on different wall types, including plaster walls, wood, concrete, and brick walls. We provide specific wide-threaded plugs and plastic anchors for each wall type, ensuring secure installation.

Perfect Gift and Exceptional Support: These garage hooks are an ideal gift for friends who love staying organised. Take control of your basement's organisation and experience the satisfaction it brings. If you have any questions about our garage storage hooks, please don't hesitate to contact us. We're committed to providing a 100% satisfactory response.
description: Product Description Hook Shape vs. Wall Type: Maximum Load Capacities Double-Hook Design Provides enhanced stability compared to single hooks, ensuring your items are securely held. Thick PVC layer Prevents items from slipping and protects surfaces from scratches. High-Quality Steel Solid steel material is not easy to bend and can withstand heavy weight.
